jobs.title: Setup Meta Pixel on Custom Website
jobs.description: I am looking for a professional to set up a Meta Pixel on my custom website. The goal is to ensure that events are tracked accurately and displayed in real-time on the Meta dashboard. This may involve writing custom code for proper implementation. The task needs to be completed within one hour.

jobs.title: Thesis to Journal Paper Specialist Needed
jobs.description:
I need assistance in publishing 3-4 journal-level papers derived from my master's thesis in Materials Science and Mechanical Engineering, specifically on Dynamic Testing. 

I require help with:  
- Writing and structuring papers  
  - Literature review  
  - Methodology and results  
  - Discussion and conclusion  
- Editing and proofreading  
  - Grammar and spelling corrections  
  - Technical accuracy  
  - Formatting according to journal guidelines  
- Selecting appropriate journals for submission  

Ideal candidates should have:  
- A strong background in Materials Science or Mechanical Engineering  
- Experience in academic writing and publishing  
- Familiarity with journal submission processes  
- Excellent editing and proofreading skills

jobs.title: Node.js AirPay Payment Integration
jobs.description:
I’m adding AirPay to the existing Node.js backend and need a clean, production-ready module that handles straight-forward payment processing. The service must accept credit/debit cards, digital wallets, and bank transfers through AirPay’s API, expose clear endpoints for initiating a charge, capture the asynchronous callback, and return the final transaction status to the frontend.

The codebase is an Express app written in modern JavaScript. Please wire the AirPay SDK (or raw REST calls if you prefer) into a dedicated service layer, include middleware for request validation and error handling, and document every environment variable or secret the system requires. Unit tests covering happy-path and typical failure scenarios are essential, and I’ll run test credentials in a...

jobs.title: Evacuation Plan Design for Property
jobs.description:
Hello,

I am attaching the floor plan of my property. Please convert it into a professional hotel-style emergency evacuation map required for a short-term rental safety inspection in Fort Lauderdale, Florida (USA).

IMPORTANT  
Please do not modify the floor plan layout. The walls, rooms, doors, and windows must remain exactly as drawn.

Legend in my drawing  
B = Bathroom  
C = Closet

Rooms in the plan
Bedroom 1  
Bedroom 2  
Bedroom 3  
Living Room  
Kitchen

SAFETY ITEMS TO INCLUDE

Smoke detectors
• One smoke detector inside each bedroom

Smoke + Carbon Monoxide detectors
• One combination CO + Smoke detector in the hallway outside the bedrooms

Fire extinguisher
• Located in the Kitchen

Exit doors
• Main exit: double doors in the Living Room (front entrance)

jobs.title: Website Speed Boost -- 2
jobs.description:
The goal of this project is to significantly improve the website’s loading speed and overall performance, ensuring a load time of under 3 seconds on both mobile and desktop devices. Faster website performance will enhance user experience, reduce bounce rate, and improve SEO rankings and conversion rates.

Project Objectives
	•	Achieve page load time below 3 seconds on mobile and desktop
	•	Improve Google PageSpeed Insights, Core Web Vitals, and Lighthouse scores
	•	Optimize website for better user experience and search engine performance
	•	Ensure smooth performance without affecting design or functionality

Scope of Work
	•	Image optimization and next-gen format implementation (WebP/AVIF)
	•	Minification of CSS, JavaScript, and HTML files
